name: Tejas Gazpacho
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds fresh tomatoes, peeled and seeded
1 whole red bell pepper, peeled and seeded, diced into 1/4-inch pieces
1 whole green bell pepper, peeled and seeded, diced into 1/4-inch pieces
1 whole yellow bell pepper, peeled and seeded, diced into 1/4-inch pieces
2 cups cucumber, peeled and seeded, diced into 1/4-inch pieces
2 cups jicama, peeled, diced into 1/4-inch pieces
1 cup yellow squash, diced into 1/4-inch pieces
4 whole tomatoes, outside skin and flesh only, diced into 1/4-inch pieces
2 tablespoons cilantro, basil, or parsley, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the first 13 ingredients (3 pounds fresh tomatoes through 2 cups water) in a blender.
2. Strain the puree and chill the mixture.
3. When chilled, stir in all of the remaining ingredients.
4. Serve chilled. Will keep well in the refrigerator for up to three days.
